meta.name: Sub-1:45 Half Marathon
meta.subtitle: Serious half marathon performance
meta.description: Sub-1:45 demands 4:58/km sustained for 21km. This plan targets runners currently running sub-2:00 who are ready to step up.

weeks.title: Base Building — Week 1
weeks.note: Week 1: Build your aerobic base. Every run should feel comfortable — you're conditioning your body to handle more.

sessions.det: 9km easy · 5:50–6:20/km · Conversational pace. If you can't hold a conversation, you're going too fast.
5km very easy · 6:30–7:00/km · Shake out the legs. Slower than you think you need.
9km easy · 5:50–6:20/km · Conversational pace. If you can't hold a conversation, you're going too fast.
9km easy · 5:50–6:20/km · Conversational pace. If you can't hold a conversation, you're going too fast.
18km long · 6:00–6:30/km · Easy, conversational effort throughout. The longest run of your week.

weeks.title: Build Phase — Week 7
weeks.note: Week 7: Quality over quantity. The interval and tempo sessions are where fitness is made. Protect your sleep this week.

sessions.det: 9km tempo · 4:45–5:05/km · Comfortably hard. You can speak in short sentences only.
6km very easy · 6:30–7:00/km · Shake out the legs. Slower than you think you need.
11km easy · 5:50–6:20/km · Conversational pace. If you can't hold a conversation, you're going too fast.
7km easy then 4 × 100m strides · Start slow, build to 90% in the final 30m of each stride.
20km long · 6:00–6:30/km · Easy, conversational effort throughout. The longest run of your week.

5km very easy · 6:30–7:00/km · Shake out the legs. Slower than you think you need.
9km easy · 5:50–6:20/km · Conversational pace. If you can't hold a conversation, you're going too fast.
6km easy then 4 × 100m strides · Start slow, build to 90% in the final 30m of each stride.
14km long · 6:00–6:30/km · Easy, conversational effort throughout. The longest run of your week.

weeks.title: Peak Training — Week 13
weeks.note: Week 13: Peak training week. This is hard — it's meant to be. Trust the process and execute each session.

sessions.det: 11km tempo · 4:45–5:05/km · Comfortably hard. You can speak in short sentences only.
8km very easy · 6:30–7:00/km · Shake out the legs. Slower than you think you need.
9km total · 400m reps at 5K race pace · Full recovery between reps. Quality over quantity.
14km easy · 5:50–6:20/km · Conversational pace. If you can't hold a conversation, you're going too fast.
23km long · 6:00–6:30/km · Easy, conversational effort throughout. The longest run of your week.

weeks.title: Peak Training — Week 14
weeks.note: Week 14: Peak training week. This is hard — it's meant to be. Trust the process and execute each session.

sessions.det: 11km tempo · 4:45–5:05/km · Comfortably hard. You can speak in short sentences only.
8km very easy · 6:30–7:00/km · Shake out the legs. Slower than you think you need.
9km total · 400m reps at 5K race pace · Full recovery between reps. Quality over quantity.
14km easy · 5:50–6:20/km · Conversational pace. If you can't hold a conversation, you're going too fast.
23km long · 6:00–6:30/km · Easy, conversational effort throughout. The longest run of your week.

weeks.title: Taper — Week 15
weeks.note: Week 15: Trust the taper. The work is done. Freshen up the legs — no heroics.

sessions.det: 10km easy · 5:50–6:20/km · Conversational pace. If you can't hold a conversation, you're going too fast.
7km easy then 4 × 100m strides · Start slow, build to 90% in the final 30m of each stride.
17km long · 6:00–6:30/km · Easy, conversational effort throughout. The longest run of your week.

12km long · 6:00–6:30/km · Easy, conversational effort throughout. The longest run of your week.
